●修复闪电急行隐藏玩家造成法术透镜结构改变报错
●修复了高级鬼火带多个半途传送就可以无限分裂复制的问题

cn.description:
传说！拔出法杖的人将会成为拯救世界的勇者！

《魔法工艺》是一款魔法动作roguelike游戏。游戏以被古神入侵的世界为核心，打造了一个架空的魔法奇幻世界。
玩家将作为误入此世界又拔出了传说法杖的勇者，讨伐怪物、组合独一无二的法术、击败古神、拯救这个被古神入侵的世界！


—Q版的画风—
魔性的画风，奇异的生物，无厘头的剧情，误入异世界的主角如何与这些可爱的蘑菇和触手共存？
来自异世界的大法师即将踏上独属于他的魔法创造之路！

—自由的组合—
多样的法术，独特的法杖，奇妙的组合，被选中的命运主角将如何发挥他的聪明才智挑战搭配变化？
通过击败怪物获得各种特性的法术，组合出仅属于你的禁咒魔法吧！

—随机的强化—
随机的祝福，神秘的药水，特殊的灵魂，探索之中遇见的伙伴们又将给主角带来怎样的新鲜体验？
每次挑战都会是全新的体验，选择你的天赋，加强自己的能力吧！

—炫酷的战斗—
森林的异变，城堡的古旧，时空裂缝的混乱，拔出祭坛之上法杖的你历经多次战斗，击败怪物，获得了足以拯救世界的力量，你最终的选择，将何去何从？
多彩绚丽的华丽战斗，钻研各类法术的特性，成为真正的大法师吧！

cn.description:
MagicKit AI – 全能设备与实用工具包

功能亮点：

盡量推廣度假村的魅力，抓住委託者的心吧！！

hk.description:
從今天起，你也是間懷舊咖啡店的老闆。
提供客人精心製作的飲品和料理，經營一間廣受大眾喜愛的咖啡店。

設計好櫃台座位和餐桌座位後，就帶領客人入座吧。
一手拿著從「報紙架」上拿來的報紙看著，一邊品嘗咖啡，就能夠度過一段舒適的時光。
而在附近擺設「立燈」的話，還能讓內心也暖和起來。

以咖啡或紅茶為基底，加入其他材料調配以增加飲品菜單吧。
每個客人的心情都有所不同，只要提供符合他們需求的飲品，或許他們就會再次來光顧喔。
將這些飲品也加入到招牌菜單中吧！

還可以推出經濟實惠的套餐。
將美味的料理和飲品搭配在一起……兩者間的主題和適性也很重要喔。
在品評會上以獲得金獎為目標，用出類拔萃的料理來製作套餐吧。

有傳言說到新的城鎮裡有很棒的土地在出售。
將店家搬遷過去，以結識更多客人！！

來吧，打造出一間讓客人能夠放鬆心情的五星級咖啡店吧！！

輕觸、拖曳、放大與縮小等操作方式皆可對應。

更多遊戲請搜尋「Kairosoft」。https://kairopark.jp
這裡有許多您可能玩過的免費遊戲，也有大量買斷制應用程式！
都是2D點陣圖風格的Kairosoft系列遊戲喔。

請跟隨我們的Twitter，以獲得最新資訊。
https://twitter.com/kairokun2010

這是一款打造超棒超商的經營模擬遊戲！

自由設置充滿魅力的貨架來經營商店吧。
從基本款的「飯糰」、「便當」到飲料應有盡有，
還能設立美味的｢甜點｣專區！？

此外，將具有話題性的寫真集、漫畫、報紙陳列於雜誌專區，
感覺能夠讓店面更加充實。

收銀機旁邊當然也想擺個暖呼呼的「肉包」，
還有酥酥脆脆的「炸雞塊」跟關東煮呢。
在寒冷季節大快朵頤溫暖身心吧。

為了達到春夏秋冬24小時營業不間斷，
召集並培育充滿個性的員工，打造更充實的商店吧。

實現客人小小的夢想也是老闆的工作。
備妥客人想要的品項，讓常客變得越來越多！

為了拓展店面規模，與其他公司合作也是不可或缺的！
透過合作協商來獲得全新的力量吧。

只要進軍全國，就會有競爭店家等著挑戰！？
在爭奪客人的戰爭中致勝，衝上全國第一的超商寶座。

來嘗試親手打造出心目中自豪的超商吧。

甚至還能經營遊樂園、漢堡店及露營區！？
更多遊戲請搜尋「Kairosoft」。https://kairopark.jp

這裡有許多您可能玩過的免費遊戲，也有大量買斷制應用程式！

請跟隨我們的Twitter，以獲得最新資訊。

讓剛剛成立的棒球部站上甲子園的領獎臺吧！
球員們會根據你制定的練習量和計畫進行訓練。
練習內容方面，基礎訓練自不必說，還能針對個別球員進行擊打或是守備的重點練習。

在球場附近建造擊球中心或者是淋浴室，完善棒球的配套設施。
棒球的環境得到改善，練習也會更有成效。
不僅僅是運動方面，還可以建造學習設施。保證學生們德智體美勞全面發展。

讓球員們住在宿舍裡，就能縮短上下學的時間，還可以更好地管理飲食。
將鍛煉過的球員組編進球隊，讓球隊不斷地強化吧。

※《棒球物語》只能橫屏玩。不能旋轉。

經營一家遊戲公司，達成百萬人氣。

這是大幅強化後的升級版，新增了在自己公司內部開發遊戲機的功能以及轉職系統。

找尋優秀職員並對他們進行培養吧。
培養公司職員後，可開發的遊戲種類和內容會變多。尋找出人氣組合，在新型主機上進行發售吧！不僅如此，程式員及音樂製作等與遊戲相關的職業系統也將登場。

成為遊戲界的霸者吧。

hk.description:
經營一個集結最強選手的職業摔角團體吧！

一個新的職業摔角團體展開事業了。對職業摔角手來說，每天的飲食與訓練至關重要。
在練習場設置臥推架等練習器具，好讓摔角手們用來重量訓練吧。
他們會好好鍛練身體，讓自己能接下對手的招式。

別的團體的選手正等著您挑戰！做好萬全準備，前去挑戰吧。
在比賽前的採訪中，可以挑釁對戰對手，或是迷惑他們……

不斷地接下招式，忍住疼痛，再重新奮起！這就是職業摔角手的魅力。
比賽中的激烈攻防，會讓整個會場團結一心，熱血沸騰。
使出終結技壓制對手，讓裁判喊出第3秒吧。

團體的人氣提升後，粉絲們就會來練習場玩。
增添練習場的設備，或是製作周邊商品來販賣，也許能讓粉絲們開心。

增添旗下選手也是很重要的事。進行勸誘，獲得強大又有魅力的選手吧。
也可參加雙打賽、6人雙打賽。

來，打造出一個能讓職業摔角界更加壯大的職業摔角團體吧！

mo.description:
Thumper是一款節奏暴力遊戲：經典動作、猛烈的速度和野蠻的肉體衝撞。你是一隻太空甲蟲，勇敢闖入虛無空間，對抗巨大的首腦。

藉由特別的便攜版，讓你一手掌握九個史詩級別。

向前邁進，掌握新動作，並在可怕的魔王戰中倖存下來。被衝擊原聲推動，你會感受到每一個破碎的影響。要達到共鳴，你必須征服節奏地獄。

■特點■
·氣密一觸式控制
·肖像和風景皆為流暢的60 FPS
·九個史詩級別
·刺激的魔王戰
·迷幻視覺效果和原創配樂
·PLAY+模式（增加挑戰難度和速度）
·在iPhone X上以全螢幕顯示
·iCloud 同步

■請注意■
無線耳機會造成顯著的音頻延遲。為了獲得最佳體驗，強烈建議使用有線耳機或音響。

mo.description:
MagicKit AI – 全方位裝置與工具箱

MagicKit AI 是一款完整的實用工具應用程式，專為 iOS 設計，幫助您監控裝置狀態、優化效能，並透過單一介面輕鬆使用日常工具。功能齊全，兼顧隱私與電池續航。

裝置與系統工具：
• 電池狀態：查看目前電量與充電情況
• 儲存空間使用：分析已用與可用空間
• 裝置資訊：查看基本硬體與系統資訊
• 開機時間追蹤：監控裝置開機持續時間
• 電池小貼士：提供實用省電建議
• 相片清理：偵測與刪除重複或相似相片釋放空間

網路工具：
• 網速測試：測量網路連線速度
• Wi-Fi 資訊：查看網路名稱、IP 位址與連線狀態
• IP 查詢：查看公網 IP 的地理位置資訊

實用工具：
• 單位換算器：支援各類單位轉換
• 貨幣換算器：即時匯率與幣值轉換
• 日期時間計算器：支援工作日計算的日期差異
• 時區轉換器：全球時間轉換，支援夏令時間顯示
• 倒數計時與提醒：建立美觀倒數計時，支援提醒與重複事件
• Magic 計數器：追蹤多個計數器，提供統計與連續天數
• QR 掃描器：快速掃描二維碼
• 文件掃描器：高品質掃描與儲存文件
• 指南針與水平儀：使用裝置感應器測量方向與水平
• 螢幕方向鎖定：於應用內鎖定螢幕方向
• 音量測量儀：透過麥克風測量環境音量
• 剪貼簿管理器：管理當前應用中的複製內容
• 手電筒：開啟裝置手電筒照明
• 螢幕亮度調整：可於應用內直接調整亮度

特色亮點：
• 簡潔直覺的導引式介面
• 無廣告、無內購
• 輕巧省電
• 支援所有 iOS 裝置
• 持續新增工具與更新
• 重視隱私與效能

適用族群：
• 裝置監控與效能優化
• 日常測量與轉換任務
• 掃描文件與 QR 碼
• 相片清理與空間管理
• 倒數提醒與計劃管理
• 追蹤習慣與統計進度
• 快速使用工具如手電筒與亮度調整
• 執行簡易網路測試診斷

立即下載 MagicKit AI，使用一款智慧又強大的工具箱，簡化您的日常工作與生活！

在我们创新的3D应用中，发现元素周期表的全新世界！沉浸在全新、视觉上令人惊叹的元素世界中。我们的应用提供极简和引人入胜的体验，使探索元素周期表成为一次独特而引人入胜的旅程。

通过我们直观的界面和极简设计，您可以轻松浏览各个元素。每个元素在引人入胜的3D环境中栩栩如生，让您以前所未有的方式可视化其结构。观察元素如何相互作用，以全新的视角揭示它们的性质。

想要了解特定元素更多吗？我们的应用提供有关每个元素的详细且易于理解的信息，涵盖从其物理和化学性质到历史和实际用途的所有方面。学习元素周期表从未如此易于获取和令人兴奋。

我们的应用非常适合学生、专业人士和科学爱好者。无论您是学习化学还是只是对元素世界感到好奇，我们的3D应用都提供了一种教育性和富有娱乐性的体验。

立即下载，沉浸在元素周期表之美中，以前所未有的方式探索、学习并着迷！

Keep the words, pictures, videos, voice and positions you want to record at any time and anywhere.
And there are reminders that you can never forget.

建造亮麗的江戶之城。
配置城堡和小巷，建立出大氣的城下町吧！

增加代表商店和居民經濟價值的『俸祿』，爭取成為日本第一的大名吧。

發展的秘訣在於將契合度好的建築物建在一起，例如『蕎麥麵店＋天婦羅店』、『地藏菩薩＋帽傘店』等。

建造客棧後，歷史上的名人也許會在『各國漫遊之旅』、『驅鬼之旅』、『寺子屋修學旅行』中前來參觀。

開闢江戶未來的也許就是正在瀏覽介紹的你！！

在這款經營SLG中，打造屬於自己的夢想百貨公司！

比起前作更大规模，全新登場！
也許能打造出你更加喜愛的百貨公司！

另外與店面直通的交通工具也大量增加！
公車、電車，甚至直升機、幽浮也行！？

想吃拉麵、想要一間書局……

打造出讓常客滿足的商店吧！

如果開設許多出色的商店……

而且還有本部作品特色的租賃店鋪……
化石展、電影院、游泳池……連牧場也有！
利用大大小小各種商店組合出無限的商機！
目標是創造出特殊的專櫃樓層。

採取預測經濟和天氣的戰略性經營，
也會出現商業競爭和商業對手……在百貨公司同業的戰爭中脫穎而出吧！

夢想著成為世界上屈指可數的「5星級百貨公司」，

在百貨公司物語2中建造出高樓大廈吧。

在自然資源豐富的牧場中，佈置砂土場和游泳池，為飼育做好準備。
牧場出名後，遊客會前來光顧冰淇淋店和伴手禮店。

mo.description:
讓擁有豐富大自然的小島進一步發展，目標是成為遊客數量No.1的度假村！

首先以度假村開幕為目標，建造住宿設施後迎接客人入住。
整頓旅館的周邊環境後，就可以找出深具魅力的旅行方案。盡量增加遊客會喜歡的旅行方案吧！
只要讓度假村變得更多元，或許就能實現遊客的旅遊目的。

在環繞著海洋的小島，美麗的大海也是觀光景點之一。若能和魚兒們多多交流，就能增添更多美好回憶。
設置海草或岩石提升水質，或是將上鉤的魚兒放流，都能提高魚兒在這裡住下來的機會。

如果度假村變得越來越吸引人，也能和委託者洽談開店和商品開發計畫。
盡量推廣度假村的魅力，抓住委託者的心吧！！

蓋一間使用新鮮現摘水果的果汁吧，別忘了在旁邊擺上長椅喔。
若小島誕生了著名景點，可能會有更多遊客蜂擁而至！！

來打造一塊讓遊客們露出燦爛笑容的度假村吧！

MagicKit AI 是一款完整的實用工具應用程式，專為 iOS 設計，幫助您監控裝置狀態、優化效能，並透過單一介面輕鬆使用日常工具。功能齊全，兼顧隱私與電池續航。

通过我们直观的界面和极简设计，您可以轻松浏览各个元素。每个元素在引人入胜的3D环境中栩栩如生，让您以前所未有的方式可视化其结构。观察元素如何相互作用，以全新的视角揭示它们的性质。

我们的应用非常适合学生、专业人士和科学爱好者。无论您是学习化学还是只是对元素世界感到好奇，我们的3D应用都提供了一种教育性和富有娱乐性的体验。

立即下载，沉浸在元素周期表之美中，以前所未有的方式探索、学习并着迷！

Everything's been expanded since the last game - build bigger, build higher!
Enjoy more freedom and customization than ever.

Add public transport stations to bring in customers from farther away.
Visitors can come by bus, subway, helicopter, and even on UFOs!

Meet new mall visitors bursting with personality.
I could go for a bowl of ramen and a good book...

Build stores that will delight your regulars!

Create enough great stores...

New tenants stores exclusive to this title.

Stores come in different shapes and sizes - the combinations are limitless!

Take advantage of weather and scenery to attract more customers
and compete with other stores to be the best mall in town!

A new challenger steps into the world of business management,
dreaming of one day running a 5-star mall...

The sky's the limit in Mega Mall Story 2!

us.description:
Have you ever wanted to run your own coffee shop?

The smell of fresh roast beans, the gurgling of the espresso machine, the sheen of a squeaky-clean counter... All this and more await you in this quirky sim game!

Just set up your tables and counter seats, and wait for the customers to come rolling in. Add handy features like magazine racks, or chic furnishings to give your cafe a more welcoming atmosphere.

Coffee and tea are just the beginning—there's a whole world of hot and cold drinks out there just waiting to be discovered! Try out different combinations to make your regulars happy, or attract new customers. You can even recommend your favorites via the Specials Board.

Feel like a little something on the side? Combine food items with drinks to create Combo Meals. These can also be entered into contests—pick the right meal for the right theme, and you're sure to win it big and make your cafe even more popular!

You're not just limited to one town, either. You can move your cafe to several new locations and discover new customers. You may even encounter some familiar faces...

So, what are you waiting for? Grab an apron, boil up some water, and get started on your journey to becoming a five-star cafe!

Supports drag to scroll and pinch to zoom.

Are you ready to redefine convenience?

Step into the shoes of a convenience store manager in this charming business sim. Arrange and customize the store using a wide variety of products - candy, drinks, even hot meals. The choice is yours!

Add a news stand to sell the latest magazines, comic books, and more. Just remember - this is not a library!

Sometimes the fastest way to your customers' hearts is through their stomachs! Stock hot snacks to entice passers-by to fill their bellies and lighten their wallets.

Running a good store is a team effort. You'll have to recruit new employees to make the most of your working hours. Before you know it, you'll be offering 24-hour service all year long!

It takes care and attention to take your business to the next level. Listen to your customers, help them find what they're looking for, and they might just become regular shoppers!

When the time comes to expand, cooperation is the name of the game. Negotiate with suppliers and other companies to discover new products and unlock your store's true potential!

You may not be the only store on the scene, but a little healthy competition never hurt anyone! Crush your rivals to take over their territory and become the most successful franchise the country has ever seen!

The beginning of your journey to service industry domination is just a short step away. Stock your shelves, ring up your register, and start building the store of your dreams!

Why not try running an amusement park, a hamburger restaurant, or even a campsite?

Take control of your very own pro wrestling team, building up your members to seize the title of undisputed industry best! Diet, training, even the occasional R&R—every facet counts when you're going for gold!

With your own team comes your own gym. Furnish it with a bench press, heavy bag, and other equipment of your choice, as you'll need your wrestlers in tip-top condition come fight day. On that note, a colorful host of wrestling rivals await your challenge. Prep sufficiently and you just might get your hand raised! So fight hard, fight well, but also—fight with style!
...And crack some crass quips at the pre-fight press conference too!

As for the in-ring action, weather thrilling exchanges amidst cheers from a capacity crowd, sinking a finisher at the right moment to nab the three-count!

The more popularity your team amasses, the more visitors will flock to your gym—and the more merch you'll ultimately move. You can even erect an arcade, karaoke room, batting cage and much, much more for some welcome added revenue!

Lastly, any team worth its salt needs more than a few members. Should a particularly talented wrestler catch your eye, see if you can't bring him or her onboard! This will grant you access to a whole new world of 2v2 and 3v3 tag matches—meaning more tussling territory for you to terrorize!

Well? What are you waiting for? Mask up and get in the ring! This is the business of bash, brother!

tr.description:
Survive in endless dungeons by connecting blocks to attack, defend, and heal. Dungeon Tracer is a roguelike puzzle RPG that combines strategic turn-based combat with dungeon exploration. Connect identical blocks to unleash powerful sword attacks, shield defenses, and life-saving potions. Your decisions each turn shape the outcome of battles and your survival.

■ Recommended for
- Players who enjoy puzzle RPGs and roguelikes
- Fans of turn-based strategy combat
- Those seeking offline dungeon adventures
- Gamers who love crafting new builds and strategies through replay

■ Core Gameplay
- Connect blocks to attack, defend, and heal
- Every turn's choice impacts your strategy
- Combo effects grow stronger with longer connections
- Embrace the roguelike challenge where death means starting anew
- Develop survival strategies in ever-changing scenarios

■ In-Depth Strategic Combat
Experience the blend of intuitive block connection puzzles and the tactical depth of roguelike RPGs. Your play style varies with block placements, enemy types, skill selections, and item combinations.

■ 10 Classes and 10 Races
Each class features unique skills and traits. Combine these with racial traits for diverse builds. Experiment to find your ideal strategy.

■ Diverse Skills and Builds
Mix over 40 active skills and growth elements to create your unique combat style. Each skill and item choice leads to different outcomes.

■ Special Monsters and Block Debuffs
Face 43 unique monsters, including liches, avengers, kamikazes, and assassins. Block debuffs like freeze, fire, poison, and lock can turn the tide of battle. Simply connecting blocks won't guarantee victory.

■ Fair Roguelike Challenge
A seed-based deterministic random system ensures consistent results in each run. Enjoy a challenge where strategy and judgment outweigh luck.

■ More Fun with Repeated Growth
Skill choices evolve with each level-up
Builds focus on upgrades and items
Dungeons reconfigure with each playthrough
A structure where a single mistake heightens the tension

■ Global Leaderboard
Compete with players worldwide. Test your skills against global rankings and showcase your best scores.

■ 4 Difficulty Levels
Choose from Easy, Normal, Hard, and Very Hard
Enjoyable challenges for both newcomers and veterans.

■ Premium Offline RPG
- No ads
- No in-app purchases
- Enjoy offline play

Once purchased, access all content fully.

■ Support for Multiple Languages and Cloud Save
Supports 22 languages, ensuring you can continue your adventure seamlessly across devices.

Endless dungeons await, filled with powerful monsters and strategic choices. How long can you survive? Experience the depth of puzzle roguelike RPGs in Dungeon Tracer today!

tr.description:
Have you ever wanted to run your own coffee shop?

The smell of fresh roast beans, the gurgling of the espresso machine, the sheen of a squeaky-clean counter... All this and more await you in this quirky sim game!

Just set up your tables and counter seats, and wait for the customers to come rolling in. Add handy features like magazine racks, or chic furnishings to give your cafe a more welcoming atmosphere.

Coffee and tea are just the beginning—there's a whole world of hot and cold drinks out there just waiting to be discovered! Try out different combinations to make your regulars happy, or attract new customers. You can even recommend your favorites via the Specials Board.

Feel like a little something on the side? Combine food items with drinks to create Combo Meals. These can also be entered into contests—pick the right meal for the right theme, and you're sure to win it big and make your cafe even more popular!

You're not just limited to one town, either. You can move your cafe to several new locations and discover new customers. You may even encounter some familiar faces...

So, what are you waiting for? Grab an apron, boil up some water, and get started on your journey to becoming a five-star cafe!

Are you ready to redefine convenience?

Step into the shoes of a convenience store manager in this charming business sim. Arrange and customize the store using a wide variety of products - candy, drinks, even hot meals. The choice is yours!

Add a news stand to sell the latest magazines, comic books, and more. Just remember - this is not a library!

Sometimes the fastest way to your customers' hearts is through their stomachs! Stock hot snacks to entice passers-by to fill their bellies and lighten their wallets.

Running a good store is a team effort. You'll have to recruit new employees to make the most of your working hours. Before you know it, you'll be offering 24-hour service all year long!

It takes care and attention to take your business to the next level. Listen to your customers, help them find what they're looking for, and they might just become regular shoppers!

When the time comes to expand, cooperation is the name of the game. Negotiate with suppliers and other companies to discover new products and unlock your store's true potential!

You may not be the only store on the scene, but a little healthy competition never hurt anyone! Crush your rivals to take over their territory and become the most successful franchise the country has ever seen!

The beginning of your journey to service industry domination is just a short step away. Stock your shelves, ring up your register, and start building the store of your dreams!

Why not try running an amusement park, a hamburger restaurant, or even a campsite?

Take control of your very own pro wrestling team, building up your members to seize the title of undisputed industry best! Diet, training, even the occasional R&R—every facet counts when you're going for gold!

pt.description:
MagicKit AI – Kit de Ferramentas Tudo-em-Um para o Seu Dispositivo

O MagicKit AI é um aplicativo utilitário completo, projetado para ajudá-lo a monitorar seu dispositivo, otimizar o desempenho e acessar ferramentas do dia a dia em uma interface prática. Desenvolvido especialmente para iOS, o MagicKit AI reúne funcionalidades essenciais enquanto protege sua privacidade e economiza bateria.

Ferramentas do Dispositivo e do Sistema
	•	Status da Bateria: Veja o nível de carga e o estado atual da bateria
	•	Uso de Armazenamento: Analise o espaço usado e disponível
	•	Informações do Dispositivo: Verifique detalhes do hardware e do sistema
	•	Tempo de Atividade: Monitore há quanto tempo o dispositivo está ligado
	•	Dicas de Bateria: Receba conselhos úteis para melhorar o uso da bateria
	•	Limpeza de Fotos: Detecte e remova fotos duplicadas ou semelhantes
	•	Limpeza de Contatos: Organize contatos removendo duplicatas e entradas incompletas
	•	Gerenciador de RAM: Monitore o uso da memória e otimize o desempenho
	•	Teste de Benchmark: Avalie o desempenho de CPU, GPU, memória e rede

Ferramentas de Rede
	•	Teste de Velocidade: Meça a velocidade da conexão com a internet
	•	Informações do Wi-Fi: Veja nome da rede, IP e status da conexão
	•	Consulta de IP: Verifique a geolocalização de endereços IP públicos
	•	Informações de Localização: Acompanhe GPS, velocidade, direção e altitude

Segurança e Privacidade
	•	Gerador de Senhas: Crie senhas fortes e seguras com opções personalizáveis
	•	Gerador de Frases de Acesso: Crie frases memoráveis e seguras
	•	Gerador de UUID: Crie identificadores únicos em vários formatos
	•	Gerador de PIN Seguro: Gere códigos PIN seguros com várias opções
	•	E-mail Temporário: Crie e-mails descartáveis para proteger sua privacidade

Ferramentas Utilitárias
	•	Conversor de Unidades: Converta entre diferentes unidades de medida
	•	Conversor de Moeda e Cripto: Veja taxas de câmbio em tempo real para moedas e criptomoedas
	•	Calculadora de Datas: Calcule diferenças entre datas com suporte para dias úteis
	•	Conversor de Fuso Horário: Converta horários com atualizações ao vivo e suporte a horário de verão
	•	Contagem Regressiva e Lembretes: Crie contagens regressivas personalizadas com lembretes e eventos recorrentes
	•	Contador Mágico: Acompanhe múltiplos contadores com estatísticas e sequências
	•	Leitor de QR Code: Escaneie códigos QR instantaneamente
	•	Scanner de Documentos e Cartões: Capture e salve digitalizações com reconhecimento de texto via IA
	•	Bússola e Nível: Meça direção e nível usando os sensores do dispositivo
	•	Travar Orientação: Trave a orientação da tela ao usar o app
	•	Medidor de Áudio: Meça níveis de som ao redor com o microfone
	•	Gerenciador de Área de Transferência: Acesse e gerencie textos copiados durante a sessão
	•	Lanterna e Brilho: Ative a lanterna e ajuste o brilho da tela
	•	Bloco de Notas: Crie, organize e gerencie notas com categorias e backup no iCloud
	•	Gerador Universal: Gere dados aleatórios como texto, números, datas e mais

Destaques
	•	Interface limpa e fácil de usar com ferramentas assistidas
	•	Seção de Ferramentas em Destaque com as mais populares
	•	Sem anúncios ou compras no aplicativo
	•	Leve e eficiente no uso de bateria
	•	Compatível com todos os dispositivos iOS
	•	Atualizações frequentes com novas ferramentas
	•	Desenvolvido com foco em privacidade e desempenho
	•	Suporte para tema claro/escuro com animações suaves

Perfeito para:
	•	Monitorar e otimizar o dispositivo
	•	Medições e conversões do dia a dia
	•	Escanear documentos e QR Codes
	•	Limpar fotos e contatos duplicados
	•	Criar lembretes e contagens regressivas
	•	Acompanhar hábitos e progresso
	•	Acessar ferramentas rápidas como lanterna e brilho
	•	Diagnósticos básicos de rede
	•	Criar senhas seguras e manter a privacidade
	•	Tomar notas rápidas e organizadas

Baixe o MagicKit AI hoje mesmo e simplifique suas tarefas diárias com um kit inteligente e poderoso.

Coffee and tea are just the beginning—there's a whole world of hot and cold drinks out there just waiting to be discovered! Try out different combinations to make your regulars happy, or attract new customers. You can even recommend your favorites via the Specials Board.

Feel like a little something on the side? Combine food items with drinks to create Combo Meals. These can also be entered into contests—pick the right meal for the right theme, and you're sure to win it big and make your cafe even more popular!

You're not just limited to one town, either. You can move your cafe to several new locations and discover new customers. You may even encounter some familiar faces...

So, what are you waiting for? Grab an apron, boil up some water, and get started on your journey to becoming a five-star cafe!

Are you ready to redefine convenience?

Step into the shoes of a convenience store manager in this charming business sim. Arrange and customize the store using a wide variety of products - candy, drinks, even hot meals. The choice is yours!

Add a news stand to sell the latest magazines, comic books, and more. Just remember - this is not a library!

Sometimes the fastest way to your customers' hearts is through their stomachs! Stock hot snacks to entice passers-by to fill their bellies and lighten their wallets.

Running a good store is a team effort. You'll have to recruit new employees to make the most of your working hours. Before you know it, you'll be offering 24-hour service all year long!

It takes care and attention to take your business to the next level. Listen to your customers, help them find what they're looking for, and they might just become regular shoppers!

When the time comes to expand, cooperation is the name of the game. Negotiate with suppliers and other companies to discover new products and unlock your store's true potential!

You may not be the only store on the scene, but a little healthy competition never hurt anyone! Crush your rivals to take over their territory and become the most successful franchise the country has ever seen!

The beginning of your journey to service industry domination is just a short step away. Stock your shelves, ring up your register, and start building the store of your dreams!

Why not try running an amusement park, a hamburger restaurant, or even a campsite?

Train your baseball players and create a winning team!

Can you lead your high school baseball team to ultimate victory? It might be a small after-school club now, but with the right training, even the sky isn't the limit for this team!

Train players by assigning them practice drills. You choose what they need to focus on, such as batting or pitching.

Install batting cages, showers, or other facilities to make life better for the team. A good environment makes for more effective training! School life is not all about sports, though. Studying is just as important, so make sure to construct educational facilities to upgrade the school.

House students in a dorm and they'll have more time for both studying and baseball practice! Pick your best players for the team and test their skill at tournaments.

*This game only supports landscape mode.

pt.description:
Take control of your very own pro wrestling team, building up your members to seize the title of undisputed industry best! Diet, training, even the occasional R&R—every facet counts when you're going for gold!

With your own team comes your own gym. Furnish it with a bench press, heavy bag, and other equipment of your choice, as you'll need your wrestlers in tip-top condition come fight day. On that note, a colorful host of wrestling rivals await your challenge. Prep sufficiently and you just might get your hand raised! So fight hard, fight well, but also—fight with style!
...And crack some crass quips at the pre-fight press conference too!

As for the in-ring action, weather thrilling exchanges amidst cheers from a capacity crowd, sinking a finisher at the right moment to nab the three-count!

The more popularity your team amasses, the more visitors will flock to your gym—and the more merch you'll ultimately move. You can even erect an arcade, karaoke room, batting cage and much, much more for some welcome added revenue!

Lastly, any team worth its salt needs more than a few members. Should a particularly talented wrestler catch your eye, see if you can't bring him or her onboard! This will grant you access to a whole new world of 2v2 and 3v3 tag matches—meaning more tussling territory for you to terrorize!

Well? What are you waiting for? Mask up and get in the ring! This is the business of bash, brother!

pt.description:
The new game of the developer ""GameCoaster"", who made Dungeon Maker and Dungeon Defense!

A seemingly infinite stream of heroes invaded the dungeon and brought ruin to the Abyss.
Now you must go straight to the source of the enemy and return your home to its former glory.
Defeat the Army of Light and take back the power of the Abyss.

You are tasked with infiltrating a planet dominated by light all on your own.
You must bring down the heroes and use them to summon monsters to fight alongside you,
armed with the equipment of these fallen sacrifices.

Once you are strong enough, you may receive the blessings of the Dark Gods,
and combine their powers with those of your monsters to bring down colossal groups of enemies.

◇ 10 elite monsters and over 100 unique skills
◇ The Power of the Abyss gets stronger as you rebuild
◇ Roguelike with random choices and opportunities
